mapper.sql: id, author_user_id as authorUserId, title, content, category, visibility, latitude, longitude, region_name as regionName, image_object_key as imageObjectKey, image_url as imageUrl, image_content_type as imageContentType, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt, deleted_at as deletedAt

n.id, n.author_user_id as authorUserId, n.title, n.content, n.category, n.visibility, n.latitude, n.longitude, n.region_name as regionName, n.image_object_key as imageObjectKey, n.image_url as imageUrl, n.image_content_type as imageContentType, n.status, n.created_at as createdAt, n.updated_at as updatedAt, n.deleted_at as deletedAt
n.status = 'ACTIVE' and n.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and n.deleted_at is null
mapper.select: insert into notes (author_user_id, title, content, category, visibility, location, latitude, longitude, region_name, image_object_key, image_url, image_content_type) values (#{authorUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{visibility}, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{regionName}, #{imageObjectKey}, #{imageUrl}, #{imageContentType}) returning

update notes set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, visibility = #{visibility}, location = ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, region_name = #{regionName}, image_object_key = #{imageObjectKey}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_content_type = #{imageContentType}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and author_user_id = #{authorUserId} and status = 'ACTIVE' returning
mapper.update: update notes set status = 'DELETED', updated_at = current_timestamp, deleted_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and author_user_id = #{authorUserId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: select count(*) from notes n where n.id = #{noteId} and
select count(*) from notes n where n.id = #{noteId} and
mapper.insert: insert into note_saves (note_id, user_id) values (#{noteId}, #{userId}) on conflict (note_id, user_id) do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from note_saves where note_id = #{noteId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select from note_saves s join notes n on n.id = s.note_id where s.user_id = #{viewerUserId} and order by s.created_at desc, s.id desc limit #{limit}

select from notes n where ST_DWithin(n.location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters}) and order by n.created_at desc, n.id desc limit #{limit}

select n.id, n.title, n.category, n.visibility, n.latitude, n.longitude, n.region_name as regionName, n.image_object_key as imageObjectKey, n.author_user_id as authorUserId, coalesce(m.nickname, m.name, m.user_id) as authorNickname,
case when n.author_user_id = #{viewerUserId} or exists ( select 1 from friendships f where f.status = 'ACCEPTED' and ((f.requester_user_id = #{viewerUserId} and f.addressee_user_id = n.author_user_id) or (f.requester_user_id = n.author_user_id and f.addressee_user_id = #{viewerUserId})) ) then m.profile_image_url else null end
null as authorProfileImageUrl,
case when n.author_user_id = #{viewerUserId} then 'SELF' when exists ( select 1 from friendships f where f.status = 'ACCEPTED' and ((f.requester_user_id = #{viewerUserId} and f.addressee_user_id = n.author_user_id) or (f.requester_user_id = n.author_user_id and f.addressee_user_id = #{viewerUserId})) ) then 'FRIEND' else 'NONE' end
'NONE' as relationship, n.created_at as createdAt, ST_Distance(n.location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography) as distanceMeters from notes n join members m on m.user_id = n.author_user_id where ST_DWithin(n.location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters}) and and n.category = #{category}
and n.author_user_id <> #{viewerUserId} and exists ( select 1 from friendships f where f.status = 'ACCEPTED' and ((f.requester_user_id = #{viewerUserId} and f.addressee_user_id = n.author_user_id) or (f.requester_user_id = n.author_user_id and f.addressee_user_id = #{viewerUserId})) )
and false
order by distanceMeters asc, n.created_at desc, n.id desc
limit #{limit}
